CVE-2017-18926.title: raptor_xml_writer_start_element_common in raptor_xml_writer.c in  ...
CVE-2017-18926.summary: raptor_xml_writer_start_element_common in raptor_xml_writer.c in Raptor RDF Syntax Library 2.0.15 miscalculates the maximum nspace declarations for the XML writer, leading to heap-based buffer overflows (sometimes seen in raptor_qname_format_as_xml).
